productDisplayName: Wills Lifestyle Men Leather Accessory Gift Set
description: Style Note This wallet and key fob set from wills lifestyle is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet while you'll be perfectly coordinated right down to your key chain! Product Details Tan leather wallet has three-folds and two press clasp closures Twelve credit card slots, an id card holder in the centre and two insert pockets Branding embossed on the inside Comes with a leather key fob with a detachable buckle Material and Care Leather Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size  Dimensions : 10.5 cm x 8 cm
